category_sources: source_facts.description says it computes and verifies hash sums of files; official rhash/RHash README describes message digests for integrity verification.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository is named RHash; source_facts.name is rhash.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README has a Documentation section and links the project home page; no separate dedicated manual site was identified.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official rhash/RHash GitHub repository describes itself as the RHash utility and links the project home page.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables list hash-sum utilities; official README lists recursive processing, predefined formats, Magnet links, and multiple digests in one pass.
